c14 0.2.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Radiocarbon measurements

Functions for working with uncalibrated radiocarbon measurements

c14_age_norm()
Generate the normal distribution of a radiocarbon age
c14_age() c14_f14c()
Radiocarbon unit calculations
c14_decay_libby c14_decay_cambridge
Radiocarbon decay constants

Radiocarbon calibration

Functions for calibrating radiocarbon determinations to a calendar timescale

c14_calibrate()
Calibrate radiocarbon dates
cal()
Calibrated radiocarbon dates
as_cal_dist()
Convert a foreign object to a cal_dist object
cal_dist()
Calendar probability distribution

Calibration curves

Data, classes and functions for radiocarbon calibration curves

IntCal20 SHCal20 Marine20 IntCal13 SHCal13 Marine13 IntCal09 Marine09 IntCal04 SHCal04 Marine04 IntCal98 Marine98
Radiocarbon calibration curves
c14_curve() c14_fcurve()
Radiocarbon calibration curve class
read_14c()
Read calibration curve files

Summarise calibrated dates

Functions for summarising calibrated radiocarbon determinations

cal_hdr() cal_hdi()
Highest Density Region and Highest Density Interval
cal_mode() cal_median() cal_mean() cal_local_mode() cal_central()
Point estimates of calibrated radiocarbon dates
cal_probability()
Probability that a calibrated date falls within an age range

Aggregate calibrated dates

Functions for aggregating calibrated radiocarbon determinations

cal_density() density(<c14_cal>)
Kernel density estimation of calendar probability distributions
cal_sum() sum(<c14_cal>)
Sum calendar probability distributions

Tidy radiocarbon metadata

Functions for tidying metadata associated with radiocarbon determinations

c14_control_lab_id()
Control radiocarbon laboratory identifiers
c14_control_material()
Control radiocarbon sample materials
c14_fix_lab_id() c14_is_lab_id()
Detect and fix malformed radiocarbon laboratory identifiers
c14_parse_lab_id()
Parse radiocarbon laboratory identifiers
c14_lab_code_thesaurus
Radiocarbon laboratory code thesaurus
c14_labs
Radiocarbon laboratories
c14_material_thesaurus
Radiocarbon sample material thesaurus

Plotting

Plotting radiocarbon data

plot(<c14_cal>)
Plot calibrated radiocarbon dates

Example data

Example datasets included with the package

ppnd
Radiocarbon dates from Neolithic Southwest Asia
shub1_c14
Radiocarbon dates from Shubayqa 1

On this page
